steps.title: Run a PCR with the setting below
steps.instruction: Run a PCR with the setting below: Temperature Duration 1 98°C 10s 2 55°C 5s 3 68°C 1 minute 4 Go to step 1, repeat the cycle 25 times

steps.title: After the PCR is complete, proceed...
steps.instruction: After the PCR is complete, proceed to run gel electrophoresis for the samples.

steps.title: Prepare the mixture below in a...
steps.instruction: Prepare the mixture below in a PCR tube, the final volume is 50 µL : Item Volume 1 KOD OneTM PCR Master Mix (Blue) 25uL 2 Forward Primer 1.5uL 3 Reverse Primer 1.5uL 4 DI Water 22uL

steps.title: Mix the solution well by vortexing...
steps.instruction: Mix the solution well by vortexing the tubes and then split the solution equally into 5 new PCR tubes (each PCR tube would contain 10 µL of the solution).

steps.title: Use an inoculation loop to inoculate...
steps.instruction: Use an inoculation loop to inoculate some cells from the colony of interest and dunk the inoculation loop into the PCR tube according to the labels.

steps.title: After gel electrophoresis is finished, put...
steps.instruction: After gel electrophoresis is finished, put the agarose gel onto a UV Sample Tray, next, put it into the Gel Doc EZ System, and then run the gel imaging program on the desktop.

steps.title: Save the gel image and discard...
steps.instruction: Save the gel image and discard the gel into the biohazard bin.

steps.title: Check if the expected band occurs
steps.instruction: Check if the expected band occurs.
